body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features molten gold scales with charcoal black heat cracks, while the pointed ears glow with amber embers along their edges. The curled tail tip transforms into a flickering flame of crimson red and burnt orange, its spiral form preserved but now radiating heat. Leaf patterns on the body become magma-cracked obsidian plates with glowing orange fissures, and the teal skin texture shifts to cracked volcanic rock with ember sparks. The flower-like structure on top is now a blazing core vent of molten gold, pulsing with internal heat.
signature_feature: Flower core: molten gold with glowing crimson fissures and ember sparks.
